title: minuartia rubra subsp. funkii
intro: Minuartia rubra subsp. funkii, also known as Red Miner's Lettuce or Funk's Red Chickweed, is a plant species belonging to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae) and is native to Europe, Asia, and North America. Traditionally, Minuartia rubra subsp. funkii has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, wounds, and skin problems due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from digestive issues such as diarrhea and ulcers. Minuartia rubra subsp. funkii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
